---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for the planning tool
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. "I cannot easily filter enablers in the stakeholder maps.")

**Describe the Solution You'd Like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain how this feature will help police planning advisors or SSR specialists.

**Describe Alternatives You've Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

**Relevance to Capacity-Building & Development (CBD)**
Briefly explain how this proposal aligns with capacity-building standards or planning procedures (if applicable).

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, mockup drawings, or references here.
